videos.headline: Georgia cruises at Mississippi State
videos.description: Georgia goes on the road and picks up a huge win over Mississippi State.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia cruises at Mississippi State) 2025/11/08 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight:  No. 5 Georgia steamrolls Mississippi State in Starkville
videos.description: UGA racks up 567 yards of total offense, including 303 rushing,  and scores 38 unanswered points during one stretch of a 41-21 win over MS State on the road.

videos.headline: Kamario Taylor scores 4-yard rushing touchdown

videos.headline: Kirby Smart recaps emergence of Georgia's defense vs. MS State
videos.description: UGA's Smart notes the challenge of playing on a hot day on the road and praises his defense's competitive nature as they accumulated a season-high three sacks and eight tackles for loss.
